title: Prayer.
content:
This is what I pray
     In this horrible day,
     In this terrible night,
     God will give me light.
     Such as I have had,
     That I go not mad.

     This is what I seek,
     God will keep me meek
     Till mine eyes behold,
     Till my lips have told
     All this hellish crime. - 
     Then it's sleeping time!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Francis William Lauderdale Adams, titled "Prayer.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
